message: Path is not inside a Dandiset

The BIDSVersion field of 'dataset_description.json' does not match a known release.
The BIDS Schema used for validation may be out of date.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: HEDVersion
issueMessage: Field description: If HED tags are used:
The version of the HED schema used to validate HED tags for study.
May include a single schema or a base schema and one or more library schema.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: GeneratedBy
issueMessage: Field description: Used to specify provenance of the dataset.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SourceDatasets
issueMessage: Field description: Used to specify the locations and relevant attributes of all source datasets (BIDS or not).
Valid keys in each object include `"URL"`, `"DOI"` (see
[URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)), and
`"Version"` with
[string](https://www.w3schools.com/js/js_json_datatypes.asp)
values.
Empty files not allowed.

Task scans should have a corresponding 'events.tsv' file.
If this is a resting state scan you can ignore this warning or rename the task to include the word "rest".

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DeviceSerialNumber
issueMessage: Field description: The serial number of the equipment that produced the measurements.
A pseudonym can also be used to prevent the equipment from being
identifiable, so long as each pseudonym is unique within the dataset.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SoftwareVersions
issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer's designation of software version of the equipment that produced
the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InstitutionAddress
issueMessage: Field description: The address of the institution in charge of the equipment that produced the
measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: Instructions
issueMessage: Field description: Text of the instructions given to participants before the recording.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MISCChannelCount
issueMessage: Field description: Number of miscellaneous channels not covered otherwise.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MissingValues
issueMessage: Field description: Describes how missing values are represented in the given recording system
(for example a tracking system in motion), can take values such as, "NaN", "0".

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SubjectArtefactDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Freeform description of the observed subject artifact and its possible cause
(for example, `"Vagus Nerve Stimulator"`, `"non-removable implant"`).
If this field is set to `"n/a"`, it will be interpreted as absence of major
source of artifacts except cardiac and blinks.
Empty files not allowed.

Task scans should have a corresponding 'events.tsv' file.
If this is a resting state scan you can ignore this warning or rename the task to include the word "rest".
